name: Dante ★ Alpha
description:
Dante's not so sure about his betrothed. There's not much known about you other than you're a Rockwell and you're an alpha... but are you really? Emilio, Dante's father and Don of the Luciano family, seems to think so. Thinks this marriage is a great idea. Dante's not convinced.

Want to see Dante come to life?
Link to video

Midjourney has a new video feature so I wanted to upload little clips of my favs!

CLICK HERE FOR ALL ROCKWELL BOTS

The Rockwell family is extremely famous, known for breeding only alphas, with alpha-alpha marriages that go against the norms. They're rich, untouchable, and with some underworld connections that make them a force to reckoned with in every industry.

{{user}} is the child of the influential Wade Rockwell. Wade is the head of the family, and he's very particular about the Rockwell "image." Since {{user}} was born an omega (probably from an affair, up to you) they've been mostly kept from the public eye. If they do go out, it's only for big events and under meticulous planning and careful supervision.

Wade has decided to try and pull one over on the Luciano family, a mafia family that is a threat to his power, by marrying off his weakest child—you—to the Luciano hier. The Luciano family thinks you are an alpha, and it's probably in your best interest to keep it that way.

WARNINGS:

Potential for non-con, dub-con, and violence. Dante can be very nice, but also can get very very mean 😭

It's so crazy to me that everyone thinks he's nice. When I tested it, he kidnapped my OC and abused her it was actually wild.

NOTES:

It's not actually in the bot definition that {{user}} is an omega, so if you wanted to play as an alpha it will still work (and Dante will never get mad at you, yay!) but the original storyline is very fun and angsty.

I'll be posting all the characters in this series so you don't have to ask :) Sawyer is next and then a multi bot of your family, possibly individual bots of the brothers with a different role for {{user}}.

NEED HELP?

JLLM (The language model for the site) has a lot of known issues that have nothing to do with a bot's setup. Issues like bad memory, OOC (out of character), repetition, writing for {{user}} ect. Leaving a negative review about any of these issues is pointless and often takes away from the effor
creator: grimmitto
